daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you that quiet confidence energy today, Libra. You're naturally magnetic right now—people are drawn to your vibe. Channel this into meaningful conversations rather than surface-level small talk. Trust your intuition.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, there's tenderness in the air. Single? Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Either way, vulnerability is your superpower today. Let your guard down a little—it's actually attractive.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. Don't downplay them in meetings or group chats. The universe is backing your creative instincts, so lean into that bold suggestion you've been sitting on. Your perspective matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air, not just rest. A walk, stretch session, or even dancing to your favorite playlist will shift your energy beautifully. Listen to what feels good—your intuition knows what you need.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to trust your gut, Libra. Venus is stirring things up in your favor—expect moments of clarity about what truly matters. The vibe? Less overthinking, more intuition. You're ready for this.
weekly.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is a week to lean into authenticity instead of people-pleasing. Your charm hits different when you're being real. Let yourself be a little messy.
weekly.career: The universe is rewarding your recent hustle. This isn't the week to play small—share that idea you've been sitting on. Your creative energy is magnetic right now, and collaboration could open unexpected doors. Trust the momentum.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Move in ways that feel good, not punishing. Whether that's dancing, stretching, or just walking outside, prioritize what brings you peace. Your nervous system will thank you.
